stemHtml: How does the outside air temperature and pressure altitude affect the approach and landing-climb performance of an aeroplane?

options.a: The WORST performance will occur with a combination of high outside air temperature and high pressure altitude.
options.b: The WORST performance will occur with a combination of low outside air temperature and low pressure altitude.
options.c: The BEST performance will occur when the outside air temperature is high and the pressure altitude is low.
options.d: The BEST performance will occur when the outside air temperature is low and the pressure altitude is high.
